svg.text: inSign Electronic Signature - Complete Integration Flow
SESSION LIFECYCLE - PARTICIPANTS - COMMUNICATIONS - API INTERACTIONS
3 upload modes: base64 embed / fileURL / multipart
Optional: Broker opens accessURL to co-sign
Custom logo header, signer name, doc info
Email: Full invitation with document info
SMS: Short link to mobile number
Direct: Broker sends link via own channel
HTTPS - Signing data submitted to server
Full JSON diff for change detection
Fires on: signed, completed, opened, rejected
Sent to all signers (optional: attach PDF)

Additional APIs: POST /load/sendManualReminder (resend invitation) - POST /configure/restartsession (reset) - POST /persistence/delete (cleanup) - POST /configure/ablehnen (reject) - GET /version (health check)
